subcodes.title: The Cruel Indifference of People towards the Suffering of Foreign Races: Words spoken on 1911-11-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I have just been told that there has been a terrible accident in this country. A train has fallen into the river and at least twenty people have been killed.
subcodes.first_line_orig: میگویند یک ترن در رود سن افتاده بیست و پنج نفر غرق شده و امروز در پارلمان
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity
